title: fzPaint
description: A creative painting mod for Minecraft Fabric that allows you to paint blocks with custom colors and create pixel art using the Paint Brush tool.
body:
# fzPaint

[![Minecraft Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21.1-brightgreen.svg)](https://www.minecraft.net/)
[![Fabric API](https://img.shields.io/badge/Fabric%20API-Required-orange.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
[![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-GPL%203.0%20only-blue.svg)](LICENSE)

A creative painting mod for Minecraft Fabric that allows you to paint blocks with custom colors and create pixel art using the Paint Brush tool.

## Features

- Paint Brush Tool: A special tool to paint blocks with custom colors
- Pixel Art Support: Create detailed 16x16 pixel art on block faces
- Color Customization: Choose from millions of colors to paint your blocks
- Persistent Painting: Your paintings are saved and persist across game sessions
- Easy to Use: Simple and intuitive painting interface

## Installation

1. Download and install Fabric Loader
2. Download Fabric API
3. Download fzPaint from Modrinth
4. Place both Fabric API and fzPaint JAR files in your .minecraft/mods folder
5. Launch Minecraft with the Fabric profile

## How to Use

1. Get the Paint Brush from the Creative Inventory (Tools tab)
2. Right-click on any block face to open the painting interface
3. Choose your color or create pixel art
4. Save your masterpiece!

## Requirements

- Minecraft 1.21.1
- Fabric Loader 0.17.3 or higher
- Fabric API 0.116.7 or higher
- Java 21 or higher

## Contributing

Contributions are welcome! Feel free to open issues or submit pull requests.

## Contact

- **Modrinth**: [fzPaint on Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/fzpaint)

Made with ❤️ for the Minecraft community
